content.en:
The first is the Taishi Golden Liquid, a total of more than a thousand drops, which is enough for Ye Tian to solidify the four Natal Primordial Control Techniques, plus the first Natal Primordial Mastery Technique does not need the Taishi Primordial Liquid.

Therefore, if he breaks through to the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, he can have five Natal Primordial Control Techniques, and these five Natal Primordial Control Techniques are all Supreme Primordial Control Techniques!

In addition to these Taishi Golden Liquid, other resources were also extremely abundant, among which there were many treasures that were of great use to the half-step Fivefold Ancestor, and their number had also reached an incomparably terrifying level.

The resources that Ye Tian had obtained before were simply negligible compared to this time.

Even the resources obtained in the cloudless world are far from enough to be comparable to this one!

"There are too many resources, even if I consume a lot of resources, maybe all the resources needed by the Quadruple Origin Ancestor Realm can be gathered!" Ye Tian muttered.

It took him a long time to put these resources together one by one.

The next step is to continue to create the Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique.

He has only created three Supreme Primordial Mastery Techniques so far, and he still needs to create two Supreme Primordial Mastery Techniques before he can impact the Fourfold Primordial Ancestor Realm.

Therefore, he is not in a hurry to break through at the moment.

In the following years, Ye Tian slowly comprehended the creation of the Supreme Primordial Control Technique, and with his comprehension and heritage, he could probably create a Supreme Primordial Control Technique in about 10,000 Primordial Eras.

This time, he was going to create a domain-type supreme primordial mastery technique that had the effects of suppression, restraint, and group attack.

In the blink of an eye, the years of the early 10,000 Origin Era have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian created such a supreme primordial control technique.

Once this primordial mastery technique is cast, it will turn into a black light field, and the weaker primordial ancestor will be directly crushed, an effect similar to the effect of the core area of the Cloudless Rim.

Ye Tian named this supreme primordial control technique the Endless Black Domain!

Then, Ye Tian continued to create the fifth Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique, this time to create an amplified Primordial Mastery Technique, which could increase the power of other Primordial Mastery Techniques.

It takes a little longer to create this primordial mastery technique.

The years passed.

Ye Tian spent more than 20,000 Origin Domain Era this time, and only then did he create the Supreme Primordial Control Technique, the Endless Primordial Body, which met his requirements.

Once you enter the Endless Primordial Body, the effects of other Primordial Mastery Techniques will skyrocket.

Moreover, the Endless Primordial Body could also be fused with Zhou Tian's Primordial Body, bursting out with even more powerful power.

"It's all done at last!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

He could finally go and attack the Quadruple Ancestor Realm now.

And he also inquired, many Holy Sons had broken through to the Quadruple Origin Ancestor realm, and the number of Triple Primordial Ancestor level Holy Sons had greatly decreased.

On this day, Ye Tian applied to break through the Quadruple Ancestor.

As a result, the upper echelons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate opened the Primordial Black Mountain for Ye Tian.

The Primordial Black Mountain is a mountain peak located on the Primordial Black Sea, it was not originally a mountain, but the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors used the magic circle to gather countless primordial Black Sea energies together, and constantly compressed and condensed into the appearance of a mountain.

Moreover, it also transformed the original Black Sea energy to a level that was very easy to absorb.

Therefore, if you attack the Quadruple Ancestor in the Primordial Black Mountain, you can quickly absorb enough energy to complete the breakthrough, and you can quickly stabilize the realm.

......

Proto-Montenegro.

Ye Tian came here through a portal.

As soon as he came here, he sensed an incomparably rich energy, and it was too pure, even purer than the energy of the primordial Black Sea, which was the energy that had been purified countless times.

The primordial black mountain had a space dedicated to retreat and impact the quadruple realm, so after Ye Tian chose a space, he began to impact the quadruple primordial ancestor.

The Triple Primordial Ancestor impacts the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, and only needs to cultivate to reach the peak of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, comprehend the Nine Extreme Extremes, and create a Primordial Control Technique.

The reason why it is required to create a primordial mastery technique is naturally to solidify it into a natal primordial mastery technique, even if it is the lowest-level primordial mastery technique that only contains the nine extreme extremes, it is okay.

"Solidifying the Natal Primordial Control Technique is the key to breaking through, and it must also be solidified on the body of the Primordial Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And Ye Tian's original ancestor body is the original Zhou Tian's body.

Soon, Ye Tian urged the Primordial Zhou Tian's body, and then solidified the first supreme primordial control technique on the Primordial Zhou Tian's body.

Since it is the first supreme primordial mastery technique, there is no need for the Taishi Gold Liquid.

Rumble!!!!

One after another Extreme Extreme Dao converged together, turning into the Primordial Control Technique of Endless Golden Light, and then solidified it on the Primordial Zhou Tian's body according to the breakthrough method given by the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

Time passed slowly, and the first natal primordial control technique was finally solidified.

At this time, Ye Tian felt saturated, and it seemed that he could only solidify this kind of natal primordial control technique.

However, he still has the Taishi Gold Liquid.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took out three hundred and sixty-five drops of Taishi Golden Liquid and swallowed it directly.

As the energy of the Primal Liquid emanated, that saturation disappeared.

Ye Tian immediately began to solidify the second primordial control technique—Endless Extreme Speed!

Finally, when the three hundred and sixty-five drops of the Origin Gold Liquid were exhausted, the Endless Extreme Speed was also completely solidified on the body of the Primordial Zhou Tian, turning into the second Natal Primordial Control Technique.

"Begin to solidify the third Natal Primordial Mastery Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After taking another three hundred and sixty-five drops of Taishi Golden Liquid, he began to solidify the third Natal Primordial Control Technique, the Endless Light Shield.

Finally, the third natal primordial mastery technique was successfully solidified.

After only solidifying the three natal primordial control techniques, Ye Tian felt that his cultivation was about to be unstable, and he was about to break through completely.

So, he forcibly suppressed the cultivation and continued to solidify the fourth primordial control technique.

After solidifying the fourth primordial mastery technique Endless Black Domain, and quickly solidifying the fifth primordial mastery technique Endless Primordial Body.

After the five supreme primordial control techniques were all solidified, Ye Tian's primordial Zhou Tian's body could no longer be suppressed at all, and he directly broke the shackles and began to transform into the fourfold primordial Zhou Tian's body at the level of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Will, Origin Ancestor's power, and Origin Ancestor's body were all skyrocketing, frantically absorbing the energy of the Primordial Black Mountain.

Rumble!!!!

Endless energy surged in, helping Ye Tian complete the breakthrough.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation also officially entered the early realm of the Fourfold Ancestor, and gradually stabilized.
